FAQ

Got Questions? We've Got Answers.

What areas do you serve?
+
We serve Greater Houston including Spring, Katy, Cypress, The Woodlands, Humble, Conroe, and surrounding areas. Not sure if we reach you? Call or text (713) 208-0502 and we'll confirm!
Is the mechanical bull safe?
+
Absolutely. Our bull comes with a large inflatable safety mat, and our trained operator controls the speed at all times. It's fully adjustable — from slow and gentle for kids to wild and fast for adults!
How far in advance should I book?
+
We recommend booking 1–2 weeks in advance, especially for weekends and holidays. We do our best to accommodate last-minute bookings — just give us a call!
Is delivery and setup included?
+
Yes! Delivery, setup, and takedown are always included. We handle everything so you can focus on enjoying the party. We confirm your arrival time the day before.
Can I bundle the bull and photo booth?
+
Yes! Bundling the mechanical bull + photo booth is our most popular combo. Add a water slide or moonbounce for the complete party package. Contact us for a custom quote.
Do you speak Spanish?
+
¡Sí! Our entire team is bilingual — English and Spanish. We want every family in Houston to feel comfortable booking with us. DM us on Facebook or call us en español anytime.
